ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 131-102) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (W/L) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the game was played at home */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's coach */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's home arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_arena_id FOREIGN KEY ("arena_id") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "3pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "3pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "3pp" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the arena is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the arena is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is on */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player on the team */,
  "roster_status" TEXT /* Status of the player on the roster (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game line entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the lineup belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the lineup */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the lineup (e.g., PG, SG, SF) */,
  "starter" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the player started the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_lines_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_lines_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the official worked */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season standing entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the standing belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, front office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission (e.g., view_game_stats, edit_roster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
